lingala.use_modus_ponens_p_q_and_p_gives_q: Salelá Modus Ponens: P→Q mpe P epesi Q
lingala.use_modus_tollens_p_q_and_q_gives_p: Salelá Modus Tollens: P→Q mpe ¬Q epesi ¬P
lingala.hs_chains_p_q_and_q_r_then_mp_with_p: HS ekangisi P→Q mpe Q→R, na sima MP na P
lingala.disjunctive_syllogism_p_q_and_p_gives_: Silogisme ya bokabwani: P∨Q mpe ¬P epesi Q
lingala.conjunction_gives_p_q_then_modus_ponen: Bosangani epesi P∧Q, na sima Modus Ponens epesi R
lingala.chain_p_q_and_q_r_with_hs_then_again_w: Kangisá P→Q mpe Q→R na HS, na sima lisusu na R→S, na sima MP
lingala.mt_on_p_q_gives_p_then_ds_on_p_r_gives: MT na P→Q epesi ¬P, na sima DS na P∨R epesi R
lingala.hs_gives_p_r_then_mt_with_r_gives_p: HS epesi P→R, na sima MT na ¬R epesi ¬P
lingala.truth_tables_every_input_combination_e: Bitabele ya bosolo — bosangani nyonso ya makotelo, ebimeli nyonso
lingala.for_n_variables_the_table_has_2_rows_a: Mpo na ba variable n, etabele ezali na milɔngɔ 2ⁿ. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF — porte mokomoko ezali kaka likonzí moko. Aljɛbri ya Boolean (Boole, 1854) ezali moboko ya sirkwi nyonso ya dijital, motuna nyonso ya boluki, mpe likambo nyonso na kode.
lingala.proof_builder_derive_conclusions_step_: Motongi elembeteli — bimisá masukami litɛmwɛli na litɛmwɛli
lingala.modus_ponens_modus_tollens_hypothetica: Modus ponens, modus tollens, silogisme ya likanisi, silogisme ya bokabwani — mibeko mwambe ya bokatani ezipi mingi ya lojiki ya maloba ya ebandeli. Litambe mokomoko emilakisi na NKOMBO, na mayoki te.
lingala.challenges_graded_tautology_contradict: Mikakatano — masano ya tautology mpe bokeseni na biteni
lingala.tautology_always_true_contradiction_al: Tautology = solo ntango nyonso; bokeseni = lokuta ntango nyonso; likoki = mbala mosusu nyonso mibale. Mobeko ya Aristote ya bokeseni te (350 LY) ezali mobeko ya kala koleka oyo ebimaki. Momesano AP CS Principles + ebandeli ya matematiki ya bokabwani.
lingala.logic_gates_transistors_all_the_way_do: Baporte ya lojiki — ba transistor tii na nse
lingala.nand_is_functionally_complete_you_can_: NAND ezali ya kokoka na mosala — okoki kotonga porte nyonso mosusu kaka na NAND. CPU ya lelo ezali na ba transistor pene 10 miliare oyo esalaka matematiki ya Boolean kaka oyo ozali kotonga awa.
lingala.probability_logic_inference_under_unce: Lojiki ya probabilité — bokatani na nse ya kozanga koyeba
lingala.p_and_q_each_carry_a_probability_inste: P mpe Q mokomoko ememaka probabilité na esika ya solo/lokuta ya makasi. Mpo na makambo ya bonsomi, P(P∧Q) = P(P) × P(Q). Talá ndenge mokano ya bondimi ebongolaka ba probabilité ya pɛtɛɛ na bokatani ya bokabwani.
lingala.drag_tiles_or_click_to_add: Benda ba tuile to fina mpo na kobakisa
lingala.drop_symbols_here_or_click_above: Tiká bilembo awa to fina likoló…
lingala.toggle_english_and_formal_notation: Bongolá kati na ekomeli ya Lingála mpe ya bokonzi
lingala.enter_an_expression_above_to_generate_: Kotisá liloba likoló mpo na kosala etabele ya bosolo
lingala.ai_explain_truth_table_expression: AI: limbolá liloba ya etabele ya bosolo
lingala.logiclab_data_table: etabele ya ba données ya laboratware ya lojiki
lingala.drag_or_click_to_select: Benda to fina mpo na kopona
lingala.drag_or_click_to_select_2: Benda to fina mpo na kopona
lingala.your_interests_basketball_cooking_vide: Bilingi na yo (basketball, kolamba, masano ya video...)
lingala.your_interests_for_ai_personalization: Bilingi na yo mpo na bopɛsi-bomoto ya AI
lingala.ai_generated_is_this_argument_valid: AI esali: ntembe oyo ezali ya solo?
lingala.can_we_conclude_the_butler_is_innocent: Tokoki kosukisa ete mosali ya ndako azali na likambo te?
lingala.can_we_conclude_the_creature_has_no_wi: Tokoki kosukisa ete ekelamu ezali na mapapu te?
lingala.can_we_conclude_no_dark_clouds: Tokoki kosukisa ete mapata ya moindo ezali te?
lingala.toggle_inputs_to_see_the_output_live: Bongolá makotelo mpo na komona ebimeli mbala moko
lingala.p_likely_q_uncertain: 🟡 P ekoki; Q ya solo te
lingala.sliders_for_p_q_truth_probabilities_co: Ba slider mpo na ba probabilité ya bosolo ya P, Q mpe mokano ya bondimi. Mbano ya bokatani ya bokabwani ya makambo 4. Matonga te, bolakisi te.
lingala.independence_vs_correlation_when_does_: Bonsomi vs. boyokani — moko na moko esalaka ntango nini?
lingala.how_does_threshold_change_inference_ou: Mokano ebongolaka mbano ya bokatani ndenge nini?
lingala.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Nasosoli — limbolá na maloba na ngai moko
lingala.design_note_discrete_4_state_inference: Note ya design: elembo ya bokatani ya bokabwani ya makambo 4; matonga ya probabilité te; bolakisi te — na nko.
lingala.toggle_educational_panel_what_is_propo: Bongolá panneau ya mateya: Lojiki ya maloba ezali nini?
lingala.learn_what_is_propositional_logic: Yekolá: Lojiki ya maloba ezali nini?
lingala.propositional_logic_studies_how_the_tr: Lojiki ya maloba eyekolaka ndenge bosolo ya maloba ya mindɔndɔ etalelaka oyo ya pɛtɛɛ.
lingala.is_any_statement_that_is_either_true_o: ezali liloba nyonso oyo ezali solo to lokuta — lokola «Mbula ezali konɔka» to «2 + 2 = 4».
lingala.valid_vs_invalid_arguments: Bantembe ya solo vs. ya solo te
lingala.argument_guarantees_the_conclusion_if_: ntembe endimisi suka SOKI mibandeli ezali solo.
lingala.argument_fallacy_has_a_logical_gap_eve: ntembe (libunga ya lojiki) ezali na lidusu ya lojiki — ata soki mibandeli ezali solo, suka elandaka na ngninga te.
lingala.common_fallacies_affirming_the_consequ: Mabunga ya lojiki ya mingi: kondima oyo elandi (P→Q, Q ∴ P✗), koboya oyo eliyaki liboso (P→Q, ¬P ∴ ¬Q✗)
lingala.truth_tables_boolean_logic_at_a_glance: 🔍 Bitabele ya bosolo — lojiki ya Boolean na botali moko
lingala.truth_table_visualization_cycling_thro: Bomonisi ya etabele ya bosolo oyo ezali kobaluka na baporte ya lojiki AND, OR, XOR mpe NAND.
